name: brainiac-manager
description: Host lifecycle skills for Brainiac: /brainiac-install (one-command host install + nightly registration + audit-key provisioning), /brainiac-update (refresh engine + workspaces + nightly after a marketplace update), /brainiac-uninstall (teardown), /brainiac-health (one-command doctor+status+trend+heartbeat readout with a HEALTHY/DEGRADED/BROKEN verdict). Separate from brainiac-kernel/brainiac-extras so daily-use skills never pull in host-only commands.
